name: Watermelon Fire and Ice Salsa
recipeInstructions:
Use up to 2 tablespoons chopped jalapenos, depending on taste.
Combine all ingredients. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Serve on sliced oranges or cheese-filled manicotti. Or, top 1 cup sour cream with 1 cup salsa and serve with chips.
PER SERVING: Approximately 31 calories, 1 gram protein, .4 grams fat, 7 grams carbohydrates, 0 cholesterol, 156 milligrams sodium. FROM: Light & Easy Meals from Family Circle Magazine issue August 1992. NOTE: Lower sodium figure by using garlic powder in place of garlic salt and adding lite salt to taste.
